# Finance Dashboard UI

## Copilot Instructions

- Use functional React components and hooks only.
- Keep code beginner-friendly, modular, and easy to maintain.
- Prefer Tailwind CSS utility classes for styling.
- Keep reusable UI pieces in `src/components`.
- Keep page-level screens in `src/pages`.
- Keep mock data in `src/data`, shared state in `src/context`, and helpers in `src/utils`.
- Preserve the responsive dashboard shell and the existing visual style when making changes.
